节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides methods to operate or manage Bluetooth.
Indicate the profile connection state.
Indicate the profile id.
Indicate the profile uuid.
Indicate the major class of a bluetooth device.
Indicate the major minor class of a bluetooth device.

Get the profile connection state of the current device. With profileId, returns the current connection state of this profile, {@link ProfileConnectionState}. Without profileId, if any profile is connected, {@link ProfileConnectionState#STATE_CONNECTED} is returned. Otherwise, {@link ProfileConnectionState#STATE_DISCONNECTED} is returned.
注释信息: @param { ProfileId } [profileId] - Indicate the profile id. This is an optional parameter.

parameters.说明: ProfileId } [profileId] - Indicate the profile id. This is an optional parameter.

节点.功能描述: Starts pairing with a remote Bluetooth device.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates device ID. For example, "11:22:33:AA:BB:FF".
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of pairDevice.

节点.功能描述: Starts pairing with a remote Bluetooth device.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates device ID. For example, "11:22:33:AA:BB:FF".

节点.功能描述: Starts pairing with a credible remote Bluetooth device with transport. This interface does not trigger a dialog box and does not require user authorization. Only specific system application can use this function.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates device ID. For example, "11:22:33:AA:BB:FF".
@param { BluetoothTransport } transport - the transport of the remote device to pair.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of pairCredibleDevice.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Non-system applications are not allowed to use system APIs.

parameters.说明: the transport of the remote device to pair.

error_codes.description: Non-system applications are not allowed to use system APIs.

节点.功能描述: Starts pairing with a credible remote Bluetooth device with transport. This interface does not trigger a dialog box and does not require user authorization. Only specific system application can use this function.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates device ID. For example, "11:22:33:AA:BB:FF".
@param { BluetoothTransport } transport - the transport of the remote device to pair.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Non-system applications are not allowed to use system APIs.

parameters.说明: the transport of the remote device to pair.

error_codes.description: Non-system applications are not allowed to use system APIs.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the name of a peer Bluetooth device.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates device ID. For example, "11:22:33:AA:BB:FF".
@returns { string } Returns the device name in character string format.
节点.return_description: Returns the device name in character string format.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the class of a peer Bluetooth device.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates device ID. For example, "11:22:33:AA:BB:FF".
@returns { DeviceClass } The class of the remote device.
节点.return_description: The class of the remote device.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the Bluetooth local name of a device.
注释信息: @returns { string } Returns the name the device.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the list of Bluetooth devices that have been paired with the current device.
注释信息: @returns { Array<string> } Returns a list of paired Bluetooth devices's address.
节点.return_description: Returns a list of paired Bluetooth devices's address.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the pair state of a specified device.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates device ID. For example, "11:22:33:AA:BB:FF".

节点.功能描述: Sets the confirmation of pairing with a certain device.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates device ID. For example, "11:22:33:AA:BB:FF".
@param { boolean } accept - Indicates whether to accept the pairing request, {@code true} indicates accept or {@code false} otherwise.

parameters.说明: Indicates whether to accept the pairing request, {@code true} indicates accept or {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Set the pin during pairing when the pin type is PIN_TYPE_ENTER_PIN_CODE.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates device ID. For example, "11:22:33:AA:BB:FF".
@param { string } code - The pin code entered by the user.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of setDevicePinCode.

parameters.说明: The pin code entered by the user.

节点.功能描述: Set the pin during pairing when the pin type is PIN_TYPE_ENTER_PIN_CODE.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates device ID. For example, "11:22:33:AA:BB:FF".
@param { string } code - The pin code entered by the user.

parameters.说明: The pin code entered by the user.

节点.功能描述: Sets the Bluetooth friendly name of a device.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Indicates a valid Bluetooth name.

节点.功能描述: Sets the Bluetooth scan mode for a device.
注释信息: @param { ScanMode } mode - Indicates the Bluetooth scan mode to set.
@param { number } duration - Indicates the duration in seconds, in which the host is discoverable.

parameters.说明: Indicates the Bluetooth scan mode to set.
Indicates the duration in seconds, in which the host is discoverable.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the Bluetooth scanning mode of a device.
注释信息: @returns { ScanMode } Returns the Bluetooth scanning mode.

节点.功能描述: Starts scanning Bluetooth devices.
Stops Bluetooth device scanning.
Check if bluetooth is discovering.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the local device is discovering; returns {@code false} otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the local device is discovering; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Subscribe the event reported when a remote Bluetooth device is discovered.

parameters.说明: Type of the discovering event to listen for.

节点.功能描述: Describes the class of a bluetooth device.
Address of a Bluetooth device.
Profile connection state of the device.
Describes the bond key param.
ID of the device to pair.
Key for the device pairing.
Indicates the pairing type to a peer device.
Describes the class of a bluetooth device.
Major classes of Bluetooth devices.
Major and minor classes of Bluetooth devices.
Class of the device.
Enum for the transport of a remote device
The value of bluetooth transport BR/EDR.
The value of bluetooth transport LE.
The enum of BR scan mode.
Indicates the scan mode is none
Indicates the scan mode is connectable
Indicates the scan mode is general discoverable
Indicates the scan mode is limited discoverable
Indicates the scan mode is connectable and general discoverable
Indicates the scan mode is connectable and limited discoverable
The enum of bond state.
Indicate the bond state is invalid
Indicate the bond state is bonding
Indicate the bond state is bonded
Enum for the type of pairing to a remote device
The user needs to enter the pin code displayed on the peer device.
The user needs to enter the passkey displayed on the peer device.
The user needs to confirm the passkey displayed on the local device.
The user needs to accept or deny the pairing request.
The user needs to enter the passkey displayed on the local device on the peer device.
The user needs to enter the pin code displayed on the peer device, used for bluetooth 2.0.
The user needs to accept or deny the OOB pairing request.
The user needs to enter the 16-digit pin code displayed on the peer device.
